items.title: Quote of the day by Michael Price: "The goal is to make good returns with less risk. Risk is not the same as volatility. It’s very hard to measure risk."
items.summary: Successful investing prioritizes good returns with minimized risk, distinguishing it from mere volatility. True risk involves the permanent loss of capital, often hidden beneath surface-level price fluctuations. This necessitates a long-term perspective and thoughtful analysis beyond simple numerical measurements.

Over 43,000 LPG connections have been surrendered so far.
